message.content:
@startuml
actor Main as Actor
participant YAMLConfiguration as YAMLConfiguration
participant BufrParser as BufrParser
participant DataContainer as DataContainer
participant IodaEncoder as IodaEncoder

Actor -> YAMLConfiguration : YAMLConfiguration(confPath)
YAMLConfiguration -> BufrParser : BufrParser(conf)
BufrParser -> DataContainer : DataContainer()
BufrParser -- dataContainer : dataContainer
BufrParser -> DataContainer : See Query Collecting Data sequence.
IodaEncoder -> DataContainer : IodaEncoder(conf)
DataContainer -- IodaEncoder : encode(dataContainer)
DataContainer -> IodaEncoder : See Query Getting Data sequence.

@enduml
